tiles.title: Ceramic Blue Tile
tiles.description: Premium ceramic tile with a smooth blue glaze finish, perfect for kitchens and bathrooms.
tiles.creator: TileHive Studio
tiles.style: A calm, minimalist glaze finish that suits modern kitchens and bathrooms.

tiles.title: Carrara Marble Tile
tiles.description: Elegant white marble tile with soft grey veining, ideal for luxury interiors.
tiles.creator: TileHive Studio
tiles.style: Classic Italian marble look with subtle veins for an elegant finish.

tiles.title: Oak Wood-Look Tile
tiles.description: Wood-textured porcelain tile that brings warmth without real wood maintenance.
tiles.creator: TileHive Studio
tiles.style: Natural oak grain texture for a cozy, warm living space.

tiles.title: Mosaic Pattern Tile
tiles.description: Colorful mosaic tile perfect for accent walls and backsplashes.
tiles.creator: TileHive Studio
tiles.style: Vibrant mosaic pattern to make any accent wall pop.

tiles.title: Grey Granite Tile
tiles.description: Durable granite tile suited for high-traffic flooring.
tiles.creator: TileHive Studio
tiles.style: Tough and durable, made for busy floors and outdoor patios.

tiles.title: Terracotta Rustic Tile
tiles.description: Earthy terracotta tile for a rustic, traditional aesthetic.
tiles.creator: TileHive Studio
tiles.style: Warm earthy tones bringing a traditional rustic charm.

tiles.title: Modern Geometric Tile
tiles.description: Bold geometric pattern tile for a contemporary statement look.

tiles.title: Natural Stone Tile
